subject: Update scripts for ovn4nfv in multicloud-k8s
commit_message:
Update scripts for ovn4nfv in multicloud-k8s

* Update the image version to integratedcloudnative/ovn4nfv-k8s-plugin
* Update the CRD of provider network to support direct provider network

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1070
Change-Id: Icfa321bbd354de47af4db65b2021c87facc26871
Signed-off-by: Ruoyu <ruoyu.ying@intel.com>

Patch Set 1:

Hi Ruo,

Only one small change, could you please change the tag of the docker image build for the ovn4nfv-k8s-plugin commit 342d8470b54ca175756d0216c9f5294fd69746ec as 0.1.0 from the master in the docker hub and also change the yaml file from integratedcloudnative/ovn4nfv-k8s-plugin:master to integratedcloudnative/ovn4nfv-k8s-plugin:0.1.0

Ritu and myself planning to release the commit 342d8470b54ca175756d0216c9f5294fd69746ec as 0.1.0 release in gerrit. So it will fit nice with changes in the KUD as well.

Is this changes ok for you ?

With regards,
Kural

Patch Set 4:

Hi Ruo,

Is that we required to revert the patch ?

all the OVN4NFV pod is going into ImagePullBackOff

operator                 nfn-agent-8t4sk                              0/1     ImagePullBackOff   0          60m
operator                 nfn-operator-8574675fbc-qfjpd                0/1     Pending            0          60m
operator                 ovn4nfv-cni-w7s7w                            0/1     ImagePullBackOff   0          60m

CI/CD system is failing as follows:
